# (Elements) Multi-Image to Video

- Route: `/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/multiImageToVideo`
- Source API mapping path: `/src/docs/apiReference/model/multiImageToVideo/api.ts`
- Source chunk: `https://s16-kling.klingai.com/kos/s101/nlav112918/api-doc/assets/api-DEEF3eTj.js`

## Endpoint IDs

- `create-multi-image-to-video`
- `query-multi-image-to-video-single`
- `query-multi-image-to-video-list`

## Endpoint Paths

- `/v1/videos/multi-image2video`
- `/v1/videos/multi-image2video/{id}`

## Raw API Chunk Source

```javascript
const e={title:{en:"(Elements) Multi-Image to Video",zh:"多图参考生视频"},endpoints:[{id:"create-multi-image-to-video",method:"POST",path:"/v1/videos/multi-image2video",title:{en:"Create Task",zh:"创建任务"},description:{en:"Generate video from multiple reference images (elements).",zh:"基于多张参考图片（元素）生成视频。"},headers:[{name:"Content-Type",type:"string",required:!0,default:"application/json",description:{en:"Data Exchange Format",zh:"数据交换格式"}},{name:"Authorization",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Authentication information, refer to API authentication",zh:"鉴权信息，参考接口鉴权"}}],requestBody:[{name:"model_name",type:"string",required:!1,default:"kling-v1-6",description:{en:"Model Name",zh:"模型名称"},enum:["kling-v1-6"]},{name:"image_list",type:"array",required:!0,description:{en:"Reference Image List",zh:"参考图片列表"},notes:[{en:'- Support up to 4 images, load with key:value format as follows:\n```json\n"image_list":[\n  { "image":"image_url" },\n  { "image":"image_url" },\n  { "image":"image_url" },\n  { "image":"image_url" }\n]\n```',zh:'- 最多支持 4 张图片，用 key:value 承载，如下：\n```json\n"image_list":[\n  { "image":"image_url" },\n  { "image":"image_url" },\n  { "image":"image_url" },\n  { "image":"image_url" }\n]\n```'},{en:"- Please directly upload the image with selected subject since there is no cropping logic on the API side",zh:"- API 端无裁剪逻辑，请直接上传已选主体后的图片"},{en:"- Supports image input as either Base64-encoded string or URL (ensure the URL is publicly accessible)",zh:"- 支持传入图片 Base64 编码或图片 URL（确保可访问）"},{en:"- Important: When using Base64, do NOT add any prefix like `data:image/png;base64,`. Submit only the raw Base64 string.",zh:"- 注意：若您使用 Base64 方式，请不要在 Base64 编码字符串前添加任何前缀（如 `data:image/png;base64,`），直接传递 Base64 编码后的字符串即可。"},{en:"- Correct Base64 format:\n```plaintext\niVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```",zh:"- 正确的 Base64 编码参数：\n```plaintext\niVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```"},{en:"- Incorrect Base64 format (with data: prefix):\n```plaintext\ndata:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```",zh:"- 错误的 Base64 编码参数（包含 data: 前缀）：\n```plaintext\ndata:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```"},{en:"- Supported image formats: .jpg / .jpeg / .png",zh:"- 图片格式支持 .jpg / .jpeg / .png"},{en:"- Image file size must not exceed 10MB. Image dimensions must be at least 300px. Aspect ratio must be between 1:2.5 and 2.5:1",zh:"- 图片文件大小不能超过 10MB，图片宽高尺寸不小于 300px，图片宽高比介于 1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1 之间"}],children:[{name:"image",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Image URL or Base64 string",zh:"图片 URL 或 Base64 字符串"}}]},{name:"prompt",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Positive text prompt",zh:"正向文本提示词"},notes:[{en:"- Cannot exceed 2500 characters",zh:"- 不能超过 2500 个字符"}]},{name:"negative_prompt",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Negative text prompt",zh:"负向文本提示词"},notes:[{en:"- Cannot exceed 2500 characters",zh:"- 不能超过 2500 个字符"}]},{name:"mode",type:"string",required:!1,default:"std",description:{en:"Video generation mode",zh:"生成视频的模式"},enum:["std","pro"],notes:[{en:"- std: Standard Mode, which is cost-effective",zh:"- 其中std：标准模式（标准），基础模式，性价比高"},{en:"- pro: Professional Mode, generates higher quality video output",zh:"- 其中pro：专家模式（高品质），高表现模式，生成视频质量更佳"},{en:"- Different model versions and video modes have different support ranges. For details, see [Capability Map](/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/skillsMap)",zh:"- 不同模型版本、视频模式支持范围不同，详见 [能力地图](/cn/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/skillsMap)"}]},{name:"duration",type:"string",required:!1,default:"5",description:{en:"Video Length, unit: s (seconds)",zh:"生成视频时长，单位 s"},enum:["5","10"]},{name:"aspect_ratio",type:"string",required:!1,default:"16:9",description:{en:"The aspect ratio of the generated video frame (width:height)",zh:"生成图片的画面纵横比（宽:高）"},enum:["16:9","9:16","1:1"]},{name:"watermark_info",type:"object",required:!1,description:{en:"Whether to generate watermarked results simultaneously",zh:"是否同时生成含水印的结果"},notes:[{en:'- Defined by the enabled parameter, format: \n```json\n  "watermark_info": { "enabled": boolean } \n```',zh:'- 通过enabled参数定义，具体格式如下：\n```json\n "watermark_info": { "enabled": boolean } \n```'},{en:"- true: generate watermarked result, false: do not generate",zh:"- true 为生成，false 为不生成"},{en:"- Custom watermarks are not currently supported",zh:"- 暂不支持自定义水印"}]},{name:"callback_url",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"The callback notification address for the result of this task.
```
